title: Income Certificate
description: A certificate used to show family or household income for scholarships, fee reimbursement, pensions, admissions, and other welfare workflows.
eligibility: Applicant should be able to provide identity, address, and income proof requested by the department.
The exact eligibility depends on the official department rule for the target scheme.
process_steps: Choose Income Certificate in the citizen service portal.
Enter personal, address, income, and purpose details.
Review all details and submit manually through the official government channel.

validity.source: GO-138 demo reference; authoritative value must come from VerifiedPolicyRule

title: Residence Certificate
description: A certificate used to show that a citizen resides in a locality for education, employment, or welfare workflows.
eligibility: Applicant should have residence proof for the claimed address.
process_steps: Submit through the official service channel.

validity.value: Verified validity not available in seed data

title: Caste Certificate
description: A certificate used to support caste or community status claims for eligible official workflows.
eligibility: Applicant must belong to the claimed community and provide supporting proof requested by the department.
process_steps: Officer verifies and approves or rejects.

validity.value: Verified validity not available in seed data

title: EWS Certificate
description: A certificate used for Economically Weaker Section workflows where official income and asset criteria apply.
eligibility: Eligibility depends on current official EWS income and asset criteria, which are not verified in this seed data.
process_steps: Provide identity, income, and residence details.

validity.value: Verified validity not available in seed data

title: Post-Matric Scholarship
description: A scholarship workflow for students pursuing education after Class 10, subject to scheme-specific official rules.
eligibility: Student should be pursuing post-Class-10 education.
Student must meet income, category, institution, and course rules for the specific scholarship scheme.
process_steps: Fill student, institution, income, and bank details.
Institution and department verify before benefit release.

validity.value: Depends on linked documents and scheme rules

title: Old-Age Pension
description: A welfare pension workflow for senior citizens, subject to official age, income, residence, and exclusion rules.
eligibility: Applicant generally must be a senior citizen and meet official income and scheme criteria.
process_steps: Submit application through local office or official portal.
Approved pension is paid through the official benefit channel.

validity.value: Verified validity not available in seed data

title: Widow Pension
description: A welfare pension workflow for eligible widowed applicants, subject to official scheme rules.
eligibility: Eligibility depends on official widow pension criteria, including residence, income, and marital status requirements.

validity.value: Verified validity not available in seed data

title: Disability Pension
description: A welfare pension workflow for eligible persons with disabilities, subject to official disability and income rules.
eligibility: Eligibility depends on official disability percentage, certification, residence, and income criteria.
process_steps: Provide identity, disability, and income details.

validity.value: Verified validity not available in seed data

title: Birth Certificate
description: A civil registration certificate for a registered birth event.
eligibility: A birth event must be registered through the competent local body.
process_steps: Submit to the local body or official portal.

validity.value: Usually permanent once issued, subject to official correction rules

title: Death Certificate
description: A civil registration certificate for a registered death event.
eligibility: A death event must be registered through the competent local body.
process_steps: Submit to the local body or official portal.

validity.value: Usually permanent once issued, subject to official correction rules

title: Family Member Certificate
description: A certificate used to show family relationship details for official workflows.
eligibility: Applicant must provide family relationship details and supporting proof requested by the department.
process_steps: Officer verifies and issues certificate if approved.

validity.value: Verified validity not available in seed data

title: Ration Card / Food Security Card
description: A household food security document or card used for public distribution and related welfare workflows.
eligibility: Eligibility depends on official household income, residence, family, and food security criteria.
process_steps: Submit through the official food security channel.

validity.value: Verified validity not available in seed data
